Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0AED "HERBERTSDUMMYRUN-C000-0AED" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Herbert's Dummy Run.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Made the following changes to default to joystick control:
1. Patched the JSR $3F47 at $6063 to be JSR $9600 instead 2. Added a routine at $9600 which: Sets $95 to $01 (default is $00) Sets $2A04 to $50 (default is $10) Sets $2A13 to $10 (default is $50) 3. The routine then executes the JSR $3F47 instruction and returns to carry on the normal code flow
Also made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port two to start the game as well as the space bar:
1. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $2240 to be LDA $DC00 instead 2. Updated the message at $2A2C to reflect the fact that both space or fire can be used to start the game
